---
name: Suggestion
about: Propose new content, a structural change, or an improvement
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What are you proposing?

<!-- A short, concrete description of the idea. -->

## Which document(s)?

<!-- HowToThesis, ThesisTemplate, one of the Artifacts, ThesisRoadmap, or cross-cutting. -->

## Why is this valuable?

<!-- Who benefits? What problem does it solve or what gap does it fill? -->

## Sketch (optional)

<!-- A rough outline of the new section, paragraph, figure, or change. Bullet points are fine. -->

## Willing to open a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'll draft it
- [ ] No, flagging it for someone else to pick up
